'''nakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:juicily|juicily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:juicily|juicily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nakate|nakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nakatesher|nakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nakatesherĂ«m|nakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nakatero|nakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nakateshĂ«|nakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nakateshĂ«m|nakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinakatero|gokinakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinakateshĂ«|gokinakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinakateshĂ«m|gokinakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonakankerom|gonakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonakankeshĂ«|gonakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonakankeshĂ«m|gonakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonakankeya|gonakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nakaterom|nakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nakatemu|nakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nakateya|nakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinakaterom|gokinakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinakatemu|gokinakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinakateya|gokinakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nakakate|nakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nakakatesher|nakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nakakatesherĂ«m|nakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nakakatero|nakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nakakateshĂ«|nakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nakakateshĂ«m|nakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinakakatero|gokinakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinakakateshĂ«|gokinakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinakakateshĂ«m|gokinakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonakakankerom|gonakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonakakankeshĂ«|gonakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonakakankeshĂ«m|gonakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonakakankeya|gonakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nakakaterom|nakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nakakatemu|nakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nakakateya|nakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinakakaterom|gokinakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinakakatemu|gokinakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinakakateya|gokinakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠkĂŠte|nĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠkĂŠtesher|nĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠkĂŠtero|nĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠkĂŠtero|gokinĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠkĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠkĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠkĂŠterom|nĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠkĂŠtemu|nĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠkĂŠteya|nĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠkĂŠterom|gokinĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠkĂŠteya|gokinĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafkafte|nafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafkaftesher|nafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafkaftesherĂ«m|nafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafkaftero|nafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafkafteshĂ«|nafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafkafteshĂ«m|nafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafkaftero|gokinafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafkafteshĂ«|gokinafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafkafteshĂ«m|gokinafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafkafnkerom|gonafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafkafnkeshĂ«|gonafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafkafnkeshĂ«m|gonafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafkafnkeya|gonafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafkafterom|nafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafkaftemu|nafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafkafteya|nafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafkafterom|gokinafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafkaftemu|gokinafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafkafteya|gokinafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
